top_signals.title: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.

top_signals.title: Macklem Warns Over-Investment in US Poses Financial Risks
top_signals.summary: The Bank of Canada’s top official is warning that over-investment in the US is creating broader correction risks for the global financial system.

top_signals.title: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
top_signals.summary: As Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall, Sen. Bill Cassidy said he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf.

top_signals.title: US revokes 20,000 visas for Mexican truckers as cabotage crackdown expands
top_signals.summary:
Mexican industry officials say 20,000 truck drivers have lost U.S. work visas since April 2025.

top_signals.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
top_signals.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

top_signals.title: Reeves’ new tax charge on cash ISAs faces fierce industry backlash
top_signals.summary: The Treasury has revealed plans for the UK’s new ISA regime, which will see it tax interest on cash held in stocks and shares ISAs at 22 per cent, prompting fierce backlash from industry figures. HMRC updated the market on three rules that will create the core of its ISA reforms from April 2027, as [...]
